title: Slightly Fresher
description: Slightly Fresher aims to improve the vanilla Minecraft experience through animation-related mods and 3D texture packs.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/600a309d77756df54575474d9d49a881a8cdf00b.png)
# **Overhaul the vanilla look!**

Slightly Fresher aims to perfect the vanilla experience by adding animations, 3D items, and more.

- Greatly improves performance.
- Mob and player animations.
- HUD changes.
- Most items are now 3D.
- Changes to mob textures.
- Variated block textures.
- QoL changes.

Credits: Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

In case of any issues: Discord - **pethilqdi**
